title: rhodiola integrifolia subsp. neomexicana
intro: Rhodiola integrifolia subsp. neomexicana is a subspecies of the Rhodiola integrifolia plant, a perennial succulent native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body resist stress and promote balance in the body's physiological processes. The medicinal properties of Rhodiola integrifolia subsp. neomexicana include its ability to enhance mental clarity, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief and overall well-being. Rhodiola integrifolia subsp. neomexicana can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote a healthy response to stress and improve mood.
